title: allium angulosum
intro: Allium angulosum, also known as the angular onion or wild onion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and aiding in digestion.
